name: case-solvers
description: Claude Code plugins by nadiar: workflow skills (/case, /refine, /board, /solve, /evaluate) and context-writing helpers.

plugins.name: case-solvers
plugins.description: A bd-backed, parallel-capable workflow: /case authors stories/epics in Beads, /refine revises a story, /board shows the backlog, /solve implements one in an isolated worktree, /evaluate merges after human review. Requires the bd (Beads) CLI.

plugins.name: writing-claude-md
plugins.description: Skill for creating and updating CLAUDE.md and other LLM project context files. Teaches what to include, what to omit, and how to keep context lean.
